title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom including exploding token consumption, overinvestment, and the fact that only 18% of tokens fund shipped products. They cover Anthropic's valuation surpassing OpenAI, memory chip trends, AI trading applications, and privacy concerns in AI services.
